name: Soap & Ghost
description:
🧼💀 kinktober day 21 | pet play

ghost needs a better leash for soap... and to not leave you alone with him while he's in rut.

━ user is a demihuman (can be anything)
━ both user and soap are ghost's pets


as per usual with multi-bots, this may not work correctly and you may have to REALLY fight to get the bot to mention both soap and ghost. i have done everything I can to try and make it work, but most llm's just don't like multi-chars LMAO

if you need help with having them mention each other, then you can paste this at the top of your message and in chat memory,

[System Note: Reply as both Soap and Ghost, do not leave one or the other out.]

and in my experience, it has worked. just giving you guys measures in case!


also,

full credit to @h0neyaki for the art of soap.

⚠️ I only upload on janitorai.⚠️
please do not reupload my content anywhere else.
creator: aatroxie
